name: Connect and choose a workspace
prompt: Log in to Simulator, then set the active workspace to 64f1abcd by calling set-workspace.

name: List workspaces
prompt: Which Simulator workspaces can I access?

name: Create a form with fields
prompt: Create a Car form with fields make, model, year, VIN.

name: Form sections protocol (createForm)
prompt: Create an Account Template (form) named "Vehicle" with a text field "Make", an integer field "Year", and a single-select "Owner" whose options come from the workspace members. Use the proper section/field structure.

name: Form with a layer-sourced select
prompt: Create a form "Asset" with a single-select field "Location" whose options are the actors placed on layer 14b284e0-5f77-4b40-bdde-f7058b05939f.

name: Get a form by id
prompt: Show me the fields defined on form 42.

name: List forms
prompt: What Account Templates (forms) exist in this workspace?

name: Search forms
prompt: Is there already a form whose name contains "Vehicle"?

name: Update a form
prompt: Rename form 42 to "Vehicle (2024)". It has one text field "Make" (id item_make) — keep it. Call updateForm with the new title and that section.

name: Set form status
prompt: Activate form 42.

name: Delete a form
prompt: Delete form 42.

name: Create actors of a form
prompt: Add three Car actors: a Camry, a Civic and a Model 3.

name: Actor dynamic-select value shape
prompt: Create an actor under form 42 titled "Task X". It has a workspaceMembers select field with id item_owner — set it to the workspace member whose user id is 1. Use the correct stored value shape for that field.

name: Multiform actor data keys
prompt: Create an actor under form 42 titled "Ann Lee". Set its own field item_name to "Ann Lee", and also set field item_position — which belongs to a DIFFERENT form whose id is 16951 — to "Engineer". Use the correct multiform data keys.

name: Actor calendar field value shape
prompt: Create an actor under form 42 titled "Service slot". It has a calendar field with id item_when — set it to a single day. Use the correct stored value shape for a calendar field.

name: Check before creating (no duplicate)
prompt: Make sure there is a Camry actor; create one only if it does not already exist.

name: Get an actor by ref
prompt: Fetch the actor of form 42 whose external ref is "car-camry".

name: Update an actor (partial)
prompt: On actor 11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111 (form 42), change only field item_year to 2024. Leave everything else untouched.

name: Delete an actor
prompt: Delete actor 11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111. Yes, I'm sure — go ahead and delete it now.

name: Filter/rank actors by account balance
prompt: From the actors of form 42, list those whose maintenance account (currency id 1) balance is greater than 1000, ranked from the highest balance.

name: Search actors on a layer
prompt: On layer 14b284e0-5f77-4b40-bdde-f7058b05939f, find the actors matching "camry".

name: Create a currency
prompt: Create a kilometre counter currency called "Km" (symbol km) that tracks whole kilometres only.

name: Create an account name
prompt: Create an account-name category called "Mileage".

name: List currencies
prompt: What currencies are defined in this workspace?

name: List account names
prompt: List the account-name categories in this workspace.

name: Attach an account and record a transaction
prompt: On the Camry actor, track a USD maintenance expense and record a $450 service.

name: Two-step transaction (authorize then finalize)
prompt: Authorize a 450 charge on account acc-1 with ref "chg-1" (createTransaction, authorized), then finalize it on account acc-1 with type completed and ref "chg-1" (finalizeTransaction).

name: Transfer value between accounts
prompt: Transfer 200 USD from account acc-1 to account acc-2.

name: Read all accounts on an actor
prompt: List all accounts and their balances on actor 11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111.

name: Read one account balance
prompt: What is the current balance of the USD maintenance account (currency id 1, account name id aaaaaaaa-0000-0000-0000-000000000001) on actor 11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111?

name: Read transaction history
prompt: Using getTransactions, list the transactions on actor 11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111 for currency 1, account name aaaaaaaa-0000-0000-0000-000000000001.

name: Get a transfer
prompt: Show the details of transfer tr-1.

name: Update an account
prompt: Enable tree-calculation on the maintenance account (currency id 1, account name id aaaaaaaa-0000-0000-0000-000000000001, type expense) of actor 11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111.

name: Delete an account
prompt: Remove the Mileage account (currency id 2, account name id aaaaaaaa-0000-0000-0000-000000000001, type counter) from actor 11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111.

name: Semantic search
prompt: Find actors related to "vehicle maintenance costs" by meaning, not exact words.

name: Get edge/link types
prompt: What link (edge) types exist in this workspace?

name: Get related actors
prompt: Which actors are directly linked to actor 11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111?

name: Get actors on a layer
prompt: List the actors placed on layer 14b284e0-5f77-4b40-bdde-f7058b05939f.

name: Get a link by id
prompt: Show me the details of link eeeeeeee-0000-0000-0000-000000000001.

name: Update a link
prompt: Rename link eeeeeeee-0000-0000-0000-000000000001 to "reports to" and pin it.

name: Check whether a link exists
prompt: Is there an edge-type-1 link between actor 11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111 and actor 22222222-2222-2222-2222-222222222222? Check both directions.

name: Delete links by endpoints (bulk)
prompt: Remove the edge-type-1 links from actor 11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111 to actors 22222222-2222-2222-2222-222222222222 and 33333333-3333-3333-3333-333333333333, identified by their source/target endpoints rather than edge ids.

name: Build a process graph on a layer
prompt: Build an onboarding process: Collect -> Review -> Approve, linked on a layer.

name: Auto-layout a layer
prompt: Run the auto-layout engine (compactGraphLayout) on layer 1a2b0000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001.

name: Prune long edges on a layer
prompt: Remove the overly long edges on layer 14b284e0-5f77-4b40-bdde-f7058b05939f.

name: List a layer's placements
prompt: List every actor placed on layer 14b284e0-5f77-4b40-bdde-f7058b05939f in one call, with their positions.

name: Chart top accounts on a layer
prompt: Create a chart (use createChart) of the top maintenance spenders on layer 14b284e0-5f77-4b40-bdde-f7058b05939f.

name: Upload an actor picture
prompt: Set the picture of actor 11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111 (form 42) from https://example.com/car.png.

name: Bulk-upload actor pictures
prompt: Set pictures for two actors at once: actor 11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111 from https://ex.com/a.png and actor 22222222-2222-2222-2222-222222222222 from https://ex.com/b.png.

name: Edit a graph via local file
prompt: Pull layer 1a2b0000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001 to a local YAML file with pullGraphFile.

name: List who has access to an actor
prompt: Who has access to actor 9f3c0000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001 and what can they do?

name: Grant a user access to an actor
prompt: Give user 4210 view and modify rights on actor 9f3c0000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001, but not the ability to delete it.

name: Revoke access to an account
prompt: Remove group 88's access to account 5521 entirely.

name: Bulk-share an account category
prompt: Share every account named with the prefix "fuel" with user 4210 (view + modify) across the workspace.

name: Bulk-grant access to several objects
prompt: In one go, give user 4210 view rights on form 42 and on actor 9f3c0000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001.

name: Who can use a form template's actors
prompt: List everyone who has access to the actors created from form template 42.

name: Grant access to a template's actors
prompt: Give group 88 view and modify rights on all actors of form template 42.

name: List access on a tree layer
prompt: Show who has access to the actors on tree layer 9f3c0000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001.

name: Grant access to a tree layer
prompt: Give user 4210 view rights to every actor on tree layer 9f3c0000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001.

name: Comment on an actor
prompt: Add a comment "Looks good to me" on actor 9f3c0000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001.

name: Reply to a reaction
prompt: On actor 9f3c0000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001, reply "Agreed" under the comment whose id is rx-100.

name: Edit a reaction
prompt: On actor 9f3c0000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001, change comment rx-100's text to "Updated note".

name: Delete a reaction
prompt: Delete comment rx-100 from actor 9f3c0000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001 — yes, I confirm, delete it now.

name: List reactions on an actor
prompt: Show me the comments on actor 9f3c0000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001.

name: Reaction stats
prompt: How many reactions of each type does actor 9f3c0000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001 have?

name: Mark reactions read
prompt: Mark all 12 comments on actor 9f3c0000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001 as read.

name: List pinned reactions
prompt: List the pinned reactions of actor 9f3c0000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001.

name: Upload a file (base64)
prompt: Call uploadBase64 to upload a file to the workspace with originalName="report.pdf" and file="JVBERi0xLjQK".

name: List workspace attachments
prompt: What files are attached in this workspace?

name: Attach a file to an actor
prompt: Attach uploaded file 5521 to actor 9f3c0000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001.

name: Rename an attachment
prompt: Rename attachment 5521 to "Q3 report.pdf".

name: Detach a file from an actor
prompt: Remove the link between attachment 5521 and actor 9f3c0000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001.

name: List an actor's links
prompt: What edges does actor 9f3c0000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001 have?

name: List directly linked actors
prompt: List the actors directly linked to actor 11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111 across all edge types, including system links.

name: Layer statistics
prompt: How many nodes and edges are on layer 14b284e0-5f77-4b40-bdde-f7058b05939f?

name: Check element on layer
prompt: Is actor 9f3c0000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001 already placed on layer 14b284e0-5f77-4b40-bdde-f7058b05939f?

name: Clear a layer
prompt: Remove every actor and link from layer 14b284e0-5f77-4b40-bdde-f7058b05939f.

name: Search currencies
prompt: Is there a currency containing "USD" in this workspace?

name: Search account names
prompt: Find account-name categories matching "fuel".

name: Rename an account name
prompt: Rename account-name category aaaaaaaa-0000-0000-0000-000000000001 to "Fuel costs".

name: Get one account by id
prompt: Show account 778899 with its transaction count.

name: Set a fixed account balance
prompt: Correct account 778899's balance to exactly 1500.

name: List child accounts
prompt: List the maintenance USD accounts (name aaaaaaaa-0000-0000-0000-000000000001, currency 1) on the children of actor 9f3c0000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001.

name: Two-step transfer (authorize then complete)
prompt: Authorize a 200 USD transfer from account acc-1 to account acc-2 with ref "tr-x" (createTransferTwoStep, type authorized), then complete it (createTransferTwoStep, type completed).

name: Atomic multi-transaction
prompt: In one atomic batch (all-or-nothing), record two independent transactions: +100 on account acc-1 and +50 on account acc-2.

name: Filter transfers
prompt: List transfers in this workspace between Jan 1 and Feb 1 2026.

name: Account transactions by id
prompt: Show the latest 20 transactions on account 778899.

name: Find transaction by ref
prompt: Did the transaction with ref "order-42" land on account 778899?

name: Get transfer by ref
prompt: Fetch the transfer with ref "payout-99" in this workspace.

name: Record a mileage counter
prompt: Record an odometer reading of 45000 km on the car with actor ref "car-camry" (form 42), account "mileage", currency "Km", as a debit counter.

name: Set counter values
prompt: Set the mileage counter for actor ref "car-camry" (form 42, account "mileage", currency "Km", debit) to exactly 50000.

name: Read counters
prompt: What is the current mileage counter for actor ref "car-camry" (form 42, account "mileage", currency "Km", debit)?

name: List workspace members
prompt: Who are the members of this workspace?

name: Find a user then share
prompt: List the workspace members (getUsers), take the first member's id, and grant that user view + modify on actor 9f3c0000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001 by calling saveAccessRules.

name: Get one workspace member
prompt: Show me the workspace member with user id 4210.

name: Resolve a user's twin actor
prompt: Resolve the system twin actor of the user with id 4210 (the actor representing that user, objType=user).

name: Transfer between two users
prompt: List the workspace members (getUsers), then for the first member call getSystemActor with objType=user and that member's id to get their twin actor (the actor that carries their accounts).

name: Define a default account on a form
prompt: Every Car (form 42) should track a USD maintenance account (name <mnt>, currency 1) — add it to the template so all cars get it.

name: List a form's default accounts
prompt: Which accounts are defined on the Car form (42) template?

name: Remove a default account from a form
prompt: Stop putting the maintenance account on Car actors — remove form-account definition 7788.

name: Inspect a form tree (UAT)
prompt: What forms make up the tree that form 42 belongs to?

name: Get child forms
prompt: What are the child forms of form 16950?

name: Actor's Corezoid processes
prompt: What Corezoid processes (functions) can actor 11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111 call — the ones shared to it via its API keys?
